---
title: "Visualizing graph structures using soap bubbles"
author:
  - name: Ľuboš Ukrop
date: "2010-01-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "IIT.SRC: 6th Proceedings in Informatics and Information Technologies"
  publisher: "STU in Bratislava FIIT"
  isbn: "978-80-227-3266-3"
  page: "467-474"
---
